description: Category weights for Hawaii county-level grocery price index. Adjusted from national USDA Thrifty Food Plan to reflect Hawaii consumption patterns.

grains.adjustment_reason: Rice-heavy diet — Hawaii per-capita rice consumption is 2-3x mainland average

dairy.adjustment_reason: Lower dairy consumption in Asian-influenced diets

protein_meat.adjustment_reason: SPAM and pork prominence in local diet

protein_seafood.adjustment_reason: Higher seafood consumption — island geography and cultural preference

protein_other.adjustment_reason: Tofu and beans as staple proteins in local diet

beverages.adjustment_reason: Bottled water importance in some areas

condiments.adjustment_reason: Soy sauce, kimchi, and condiment-heavy cooking culture

prepared.adjustment_reason: Less frozen meal reliance — more home cooking with rice base

review_schedule: Annual — compare against latest USDA TFP and Hawaii Consumer Expenditure Survey data
